biological_replicate: C. reinhardtii wild-type strain 137c as well as Δlhca2 insertional mutant back-crossed into wild-type 137c
experimental_design: head-to-head orientation based on absence of PsaH and Lhca2
In contrast to the cyanobacterial complex, the absence of PsaH and Lhca2 allows a head-to-head orientation of the photosystem I–light-harvesting complex I monomers.
factor_value: C. reinhardtii wild-type strain 137c as well as Δlhca2 insertional mutant back-crossed into wild-type 137c
number_of_biological_replicates: C. reinhardtii wild-type strain 137c as well as Δlhca2 insertional mutant back-crossed into wild-type 137c
